_WARNING: Field names verified against live Zoho CRM API v3 documentation.
_verified_by: Tony Grant / Claude Code — live API docs

record_fields.Full_Name: string — VERIFIED: Full_Name is present. First_Name and Last_Name are also present as separate fields.
record_fields.Account_Name: object or string — may be {id, name} when account is linked

record_fields.Full_Name: string — VERIFIED: Leads use the same Full_Name field as Contacts (not 'Name')
record_fields.Company: string — company name on Lead record

data.Parent_Id: string — ID of the related Contact or Lead record (mandatory)
data.se_module: string — 'Contacts' or 'Leads' (CORRECTION: field is 'se_module', NOT '$se_module'. The $ prefix is wrong.)

notes._correction: The module field is 'se_module' (no $ prefix). Using '$se_module' will cause a silent field rejection.

fill_blanks_policy._note: CRM writes are fill-blanks only per CLAUDE.md locked decision. Never overwrite manually entered field values. Unknown contacts are not auto-created.
